name: semantic-junkyard
description: Agent-native semantic discovery platform for turning unstructured data into navigable vector and graph structures.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently -k -n API,WEB -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
